text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm in my office doing paperwork when...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Uuugh... Trainer, I need your help.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: My head is pounding... I can't think straight.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You're my assistant. You have to do something
about this pain...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Aaah... It even hurts just to speak. There's no way
I can do proper research like this...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: I can't even make any painkillers. Sigh... It's hopeless...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon looks terrible. I should do
something to help her.
